description: The Clan Cava is a Camorra organization based in Quindici, province of Avellino, Italy. It has been involved in a bloody feud with the rival Graziano clan for over thirty years. The clan operates in the Vallo di Lauro, Baianese, Nolano, and other areas of Campania, engaging in extortion, contract rigging, usury, and drug trafficking. Despite state crackdowns, it remains one of the most influential clans in the province of Avellino.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il primo omicidio di Antonio Cava avvenne quando questi aveva appena 15 anni, in Germania, quando Cava uccise un giovane italiano...
country_links.context: Antonio Cava committed his first murder in Germany at age 15.

country_links.evidence_quote: Michele Palmese ... soleva recarsi negli Stati Uniti , e più precisamente a Springfield , dove aveva tessuto rapporti con Adolfo Bruno - boss della famiglia Genovese...
country_links.context: Michele Palmese, a trusted man of Biagio Cava, used to go to Springfield, United States, where he had ties with Adolfo Bruno of the Genovese family.
